display_name_sources: source_facts.name is webtorrent-cli; source_facts.homepage is the official WebTorrent site.
docs_sources: Official webtorrent-cli repository README documents the CLI; official WebTorrent site provides project documentation.

tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a command-line streaming torrent client; source_facts.executables lists webtorrent.
